title: Software Developer
description:
Join Lancia Consult and make an impact

At Lancia, we help ambitious businesses overcome complex challenges and achieve remarkable results through quality first consulting.
From your first day, you’ll be empowered to think innovatively, work autonomously, and contribute meaningfully.

We are practical in our approach, favouring real world solutions over perfection and delivering work that makes our clients proud. We are entrepreneurial, building this company together through shared ambition, intelligent risk taking, and a spirit of ownership. We are genuine, bringing authenticity, empathy, and mutual respect to every relationship. And we are deeply invested in our people, our clients, and the communities we serve, committed to long term impact and trust.

At Lancia, you’re not just joining a company, you’re joining a community that’s transforming business!

Job Description

We are looking for an experienced Software Developer to join our team based in Singapore.

As a Software Developer, you will design and build robust backend systems, integrations, and cloud‑based services that power meaningful transformation for our clients.

Role Expectations:

  • Develop Scalable Backend Services and APIs: Design, build, test, and deploy backend components, integrations, and system services to support high-quality, maintainable solutions.
  • Contribute to System Architecture and Technical Strategy: Shape technical approaches, solution patterns, and long‑term architectural considerations for systems under your scope.
  • Optimise performance, reliability, and security: Analyse system behaviour, identify bottlenecks, and enhance system performance while ensuring secure coding and robust engineering practices.
  • Build cloud‑based solutions and CI/CD pipelines: Leverage cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and modern DevOps tooling to streamline delivery, deployment, and system automation.
  • Participate in code quality practices: Ensure engineering quality and consistency by reviewing code, maintain clean code, and adhere to established engineering standards.
  • Produce high‑quality technical documentation: Create clear specifications, architecture notes, runbooks, and reference materials to support long‑term maintainability.

What We're Looking For:

  • Backend development experience: Hands‑on experience independently building and maintaining production‑grade backend systems.
  • Strong backend programming skills: Proficiency in Python, Java, C#, Go, Node.js, or similar languages.
  • Strong engineering fundamentals: Deep understanding of data structures, algorithms, system design, and architectural principles.
  • Database and data management expertise: Experience with SQL/NoSQL databases, data modelling, optimisation, and query performance.
  • API and integration development experience: Skilled in designing and implementing RESTful APIs, service integrations, and distributed system components.
  • Cloud and DevOps familiarity: Comfortable working with cloud environments, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and deployment automation.
  • Security and testing mindset: Knowledge of secure coding practices and experience writing unit and integration tests to ensure software integrity.
  • Strong problem‑solving skills: Able to independently break down complex challenges and implement effective technical solutions.
  • Growth mindset: Self‑driven learner who continuously deepens technical expertise and explores emerging technologies.

Note: Compensation will be commensurate with relevant experience.

How to apply

If you are interested in a conversation with us to learn more submit your CV & cover letter to apply directly.

Our team has decades of cross-sector expertise, working with global blue chips, SMEs, ambitious scale-ups, and inspiring charities. Alongside that experience, we bring the right attitude: positivity, solution focus, empathy, and awareness.

Privacy Statement 

Lancia is an equal opportunities employer. Information is used only for recruitment, eligibility verification, and reporting purposes. Responses are confidential and will not affect the outcome of your application.

Declaration 

All personal data provided will be processed in accordance with the Singapore Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA). Information collected is used solely for recruitment, work eligibility verification, and statistical reporting purposes.

postedCompany.description:
At LanciaConsult, we work with our clients to help them get ahead in competitive environments through robust programme delivery and innovative IT system architecture implementations. 

With offices in Singapore, Hamburg, and London - we ensure that we bring real experience and relevant people to everything we do.
